attributes.action: Stop the RAF Regiment doing drill displays with rifles which light up.
attributes.additional_details: Because the Russians are laughing at the state of our military as it is. The RAF reg seem to be giving them more reasons to laugh at us.
attributes.background:
With emediate effect ban the RAF from these awful drill displays where the rifles are lit up with blue and red lights. 
It is a waste of money and making the UK forces a laughing stock.
Meanwhile the MoD is trying to save cash by not paying the paras jump pay.
